landing.heroSubtitle: Catalog your cards, build decks and binders, track real prices, trade with the community and share with friends — all in one place.
landing.noCard: No credit card • Data via Scryfall
landing.featuresSubtitle: From catalog to marketplace: your collection's home base.
landing.f1Desc: Add by search, track quantity, condition and foil. Filter by set, rarity and name, with live total value.
landing.f2Desc: From Commander to Standard. Mana curve, roles (ramp/removal...), and compare your deck against friends' or public ones.
landing.f3Desc: Organize by theme, color and set, and see each binder's total value.
landing.f4Desc: See how much of a deck you already own, what's missing and the exact cost to complete it.
landing.f5Desc: Scryfall values in USD, converted to BRL, with a link to each card's official store page.
landing.f6Desc: Don't know the name? Find a card by its ability or effect (flying, draw a card, destroy...).
landing.f7Desc: Bring your collection via CSV (grimdeck-compatible) and take your data anytime.
landing.f8Desc: Add friends, build your public profile and show off your collection. App in English, Portuguese and Spanish.
landing.shareDesc: Generate a pretty public link to your deck or collection (vaultspell.com/p/you/deck) and send it to anyone — no account needed to view. Or share directly with friends.
landing.footerDisclaimer: Card data via Scryfall. Not affiliated with Wizards of the Coast.
landing.tradeDesc: List physical cards with a real photo, set a price or the cards you accept in trade, and chat directly with interested players — closing as sold or traded.
landing.tradeB1: Sell or trade with a real photo

feat.title: Everything VaultSpell does
feat.subtitle: From catalog to marketplace: the complete home base for your Magic collection.

collection.title: Collection & cards
items: Catalog by search, with quantity, condition and foil
Total value in USD and BRL (daily rate)
Filter by name, set, rarity, type, condition and foil
Prices with a link to the official store (TCGplayer/Cardmarket)
Import and export CSV (grimdeck-compatible)
Themed binders with per-binder value

decks.title: Decks
items: Decks for any format (Commander, Standard, Modern...)
Import by pasting a list (Moxfield/Arena) and export back
Analysis: mana curve, colors, types and per-card roles
Deck vs collection: what's missing and the cost to complete
Compare against friends' or public decks, with a verdict
Make a deck public and share it

search.title: Powerful search
items: Search by name with autocomplete
Search by effect or ability (card text)
Ability shortcuts (flying, deathtouch, trample...)
Always up-to-date via Scryfall

trades.title: Trades & sales (Premium)
items: List physical cards with a real photo
Sell (accept offers) or trade (cards you accept)
In-app chat between buyer and seller
Mark sold/traded and see platform stats

social.title: Social & sharing
items: Friends by username or email
Share collection, deck or binder with friends or a public link
Pretty public links (vaultspell.com/p/you/deck)
Public profile with bio, links and contact (WhatsApp)

platform.title: Account & platform
items: In 3 languages: English, Portuguese and Spanish
Password recovery by email or username
Premium via Stripe — beta: free for the first 100
Own domain, secure and constantly evolving

modal.mergeHint: Tip: changing condition/foil to a combination that already exists merges the quantities.
modal.noBinders: You don't have any binders yet. Create one in "Binders" first.
modal.noDecks: You don't have any decks yet. Create one in "Decks" first.
modal.generateLink: Generate public link (anyone with the link can view)
modal.noFriendsShare: You don't have any friends yet. Add some in "Friends".
modal.importDeckHint: Paste a decklist (e.g. "4 Lightning Bolt"). Supports Sideboard and Commander sections, and Moxfield/Arena formats.

coverage.title: How much of this deck you already own

analysis.title: Deck analysis
analysis.disclaimer: Roles are estimated by reading each card's text.

compare.title: Compare with another deck
compare.hint: Select a deck (yours, a friend's or a public one) to see the comparison.
compare.disclaimer: Simplified comparison — Magic is more than numbers 😉

doctor.title: Deck Doctor (AI)
doctor.error: Couldn't analyze right now. Try again.
doctor.disclaimer: AI-generated review (Grok) from your deck's cards. Treat it as a suggestion.

detail.emptyBinder: Empty binder — add cards from your collection
detail.deckEmpty: Empty deck — add cards to get started
detail.makePublic: Make public (anyone can view and compare)
detail.exportHint: Copy it to use on Moxfield, Arena or anywhere.
detail.confirmAddAll: Add all {{count}} cards from {{set}} to your collection (qty 1, NM, non-foil)?

search.title: Search Cards
search.effectHint: Don't know the name? Describe what the card does (e.g. "draw a card", "gain life").
search.effectPlaceholder: e.g. destroy target creature, draw a card...
search.placeholder: Search cards... (e.g. Lightning Bolt, t:dragon, set:lci)

scan.title: Scan / Quick Add
scan.subtitle: Type a card name to quickly add it to your collection
scan.tip: Type the exact or partial card name.
